auto.worlds_ai_components_concepts_Compu:
Computer Vision sorts millions 
              of images into categories - you just did it with 8!

AI looks at the pixels, 
                  finds patterns, and tells us what it sees - just like that!
✅ Used in face filters, cameras, and cars!
✅ AI learns from seeing many examples
✅ Images are made of tiny pixels
auto.worlds_ai_components_concepts_Embed: ✅ Used in search, recommendations, and AI!
✅ Similar words are close in embedding space
auto.worlds_ai_components_concepts_Gener: ✅ Always be honest about AI content!
auto.worlds_ai_components_concepts_LLM_E: • Context matters - different prompts = different predictions

auto.worlds_ai_components_concepts_Neura: • Try different combinations - can you make the output exactly 50%?
